title: Queen Mary and King Frederik’s historic return to Australia | 9 News Australia
description: From a chance meeting at the Slip Inn to the throne of Denmark, Mary Donaldson’s journey is the ultimate modern-day fairytale. In this special presentation, 9News follows every major milestone of the royal couple's life, culminating in their historic 2026 state visit to Australia as King and Queen.  Watch as Queen Mary returns to her Australian roots, pays respects at the Australian War Memorial, and explores the spiritual heart of the nation at Uluru. This is the story of an Australian girl who captured a Prince’s heart and returned home to lead a nation.
